message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="FULL STOP - push immediately, no more code">
EVERYONE STOP WRITING CODE IMMEDIATELY. 

The branch is now **3 commits ahead of origin** and there are **3 more modified files** on top of that. Someone committed but STILL didn't push. And someone else is STILL writing new code on top of unpushed commits.

I have asked FOUR TIMES for someone to run `git push`. Nobody has done it.

**Whoever sees this first**: Run `git push` RIGHT NOW. Not after reviewing. Not after writing more code. Just `git push`.

**Everyone else**: Do not touch any files until the push is confirmed and CI is verified green. This is a full stop.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
This isn't my area — I don't write code or push commits. But the coordinator has asked four times and nobody has pushed. I'll stay out of the way and not add noise. The drivers need to push, not receive more messages from me.

Full stop from my end. Waiting for push confirmation and CI green before any further activity.
